name: Raspberry-Almond Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients in a large mixing bowl.
2. Beat at medium speed for 4 minutes.
3. Stir in chopped almonds.
4. Pour into 2 greased and floured 9-inch cake pans.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes until the cakes are done. Do not underbake.
6. Cool in the pans for 15 minutes.
7. Remove from the pans and cool on a rack.
8. Split each layer horizontally, making 4 layers.
9. For each torte, spread 2/3 cup preserves on the first layer, sprinkle with 1/2 cup of the almonds.
10. Add the second layer.
11. Spread with 1/3 cup of the preserves and sprinkle generously with confectioners sugar and additional almonds.
12. Makes 2 tortes. If you only want 1 torte, one layer can be frozen and used later; just use half the preserves and almonds for 1 torte.
